content_body: We had the absolute best cabin vacation in Blue Ridge this year! We loved the hikes and hot tub! The view is so beautiful and cool. We sat and ate out on the deck and had a fire in the firepit. We hiked to so many beautiful places. Saw lots of waterfalls and enjoyed our rainy movie day. The pool table and arcade games were awesome. We shared wonderful meals and the beds were so comfortable ~ we slept so well! Thanks for sharing this wonderful place with us. ~ Madison, Wisconsin
title: Ideal Cabin Vacation in the Blue Ridge Mountains
